tracks.title: Frontend Web Development
tracks.subtitle: Build websites and web apps from scratch

phases.name: The Absolute Basics
phases.summary: Every website in the world starts here. No shortcuts.

topics.name: How the Internet Works
topics.desc: HTTP, DNS, browsers, servers, requests and responses

topics.name: HTML Structure
topics.desc: Tags, nesting, attributes, document head vs body

topics.name: Text & Headings
topics.desc: h1–h6, paragraphs, bold, italic, lists

topics.name: Links & Images
topics.desc: Anchor tags, src, alt text, absolute vs relative paths

topics.name: Forms & Inputs
topics.desc: input types, labels, buttons, required fields

topics.name: CSS Selectors
topics.desc: element, class, id, pseudo-classes, specificity

topics.name: The Box Model
topics.desc: margin, border, padding, width/height, box-sizing

topics.name: Colors & Backgrounds
topics.desc: hex, rgb, hsl, gradients, background-image

topics.name: Chrome DevTools
topics.desc: Inspect elements, debug CSS, view console errors

phases.name: Layouts That Actually Work
phases.summary: Stop fighting CSS. Learn Flexbox and Grid — they solve everything.

topics.name: CSS Flexbox
topics.desc: flex-direction, justify-content, align-items, gap — 80% of layouts

topics.name: CSS Grid
topics.desc: grid-template-columns, areas, span — complex 2D layouts

topics.name: Responsive Design
topics.desc: viewport meta, media queries, mobile-first thinking

topics.name: CSS Variables
topics.desc: --custom-properties, theming, consistent design systems

topics.name: Positioning
topics.desc: relative, absolute, fixed, sticky — know when to use each

topics.name: CSS Transitions
topics.desc: hover effects, smooth changes, transition shorthand

topics.name: Semantic HTML
topics.desc: header, nav, main, section, article, footer — why it matters

phases.name: JavaScript Fundamentals
phases.summary: This is where pages go from static to alive. The hardest part — worth it.

topics.name: Variables & Types
topics.desc: var, let, const — and why const is almost always right

topics.name: Functions
topics.desc: declaration, expression, arrow functions, parameters, return

topics.name: Arrays & Objects
topics.desc: Creating, reading, modifying — the data you'll manipulate forever

topics.name: Conditionals & Loops
topics.desc: if/else, ternary, for, while, forEach — flow control

topics.name: DOM Manipulation
topics.desc: querySelector, innerHTML, classList, createElement, appendChild

topics.name: Events
topics.desc: addEventListener, click, submit, input, keydown, event.target

topics.name: Template Literals
topics.desc: Backtick strings, ${expressions}, multiline strings

topics.name: Debugging in Browser
topics.desc: console.log, breakpoints, watch variables — find bugs fast

phases.name: Modern JavaScript & Tools
phases.summary: The stuff every job posting asks for. Learn these and you're hireable.

topics.name: ES6+ Features
topics.desc: Destructuring, spread, rest, default params, optional chaining

topics.name: Promises & Async/Await
topics.desc: Asynchronous code without callback hell — the modern way

topics.name: Fetch API & REST
topics.desc: GET/POST requests, JSON parsing, consuming APIs

topics.name: Local Storage
topics.desc: Save data in the browser, read it on reload

topics.name: ES Modules (import/export)
topics.desc: Split code into files, share functions and classes

topics.name: Git & GitHub
topics.desc: init, add, commit, push, pull, branches — version control

topics.name: npm & package.json
topics.desc: Install libraries, run scripts, understand dependencies

topics.name: Vite (Build Tool)
topics.desc: Fast dev server, hot reload, bundling for production

phases.name: Go Professional
phases.summary: Pick a framework, build real projects, start applying for jobs.

topics.name: React Basics
topics.desc: Components, JSX, props, state, useEffect — #1 frontend framework

topics.name: React Hooks
topics.desc: useState, useEffect, useContext, custom hooks

topics.name: Tailwind CSS
topics.desc: Utility-first CSS — write styles without leaving HTML

topics.name: TypeScript
topics.desc: JavaScript with types — catches bugs before they happen

topics.name: Testing (Jest / Vitest)
topics.desc: Unit tests, component tests — prove your code works

topics.name: Deploying (Netlify/Vercel)
topics.desc: Put your site online in 2 minutes — for free

topics.name: Build a Portfolio
topics.desc: 3-5 real projects on GitHub + a portfolio site = job-ready

resources.name: freeCodeCamp
resources.desc: Free full curriculum — Responsive Web Design, JS, React certificates

resources.name: The Odin Project
resources.desc: Best free full-stack course. Detailed, project-based, open source

resources.name: MDN Web Docs
resources.desc: The reference. Bookmark this — you will use it every single day

resources.name: Flexbox Froggy
resources.desc: Learn Flexbox by moving frogs. Genuinely fun. 24 levels.

resources.name: CSS Grid Garden
resources.desc: Learn CSS Grid by growing a garden. Visual and interactive.

resources.name: javascript.info
resources.desc: The best free JavaScript textbook. Covers everything, deeply.

resources.name: Frontend Mentor
resources.desc: Real designs to build. Compare your solution to others.

tracks.title: Python Programming
tracks.subtitle: From first script to web apps, data science & automation

phases.name: Python Basics
phases.summary: Python reads like English. Learn the fundamentals — this is the fastest language to pick up.

topics.name: Installing Python & VS Code
topics.desc: Get the environment ready — Python 3.x, pip, a good editor

topics.name: Variables & Data Types
topics.desc: int, float, str, bool — assign, read, change

topics.name: Print & Input
topics.desc: print(), input() — your first interactive programs

topics.name: Strings
topics.desc: Slicing, methods, f-strings, upper/lower, split/join

topics.name: Numbers & Math
topics.desc: Arithmetic, int vs float, round(), abs(), math module

topics.name: If / Elif / Else
topics.desc: Comparison operators, logical operators, nested conditions

topics.name: For Loops
topics.desc: range(), iterating over strings and lists, enumerate()

topics.name: While Loops
topics.desc: break, continue — when to use while vs for

phases.name: Data Structures
phases.summary: Python's built-in data types are incredibly powerful. Know them deeply.

topics.name: Lists
topics.desc: append, remove, pop, sort, slice, len — you'll use these every day

topics.name: Tuples
topics.desc: Immutable sequences — when and why to use them

topics.name: Dictionaries
topics.desc: key: value, get(), keys(), values(), items(), nested dicts

topics.name: Sets
topics.desc: Unique values, union, intersection — great for deduplication

topics.name: List Comprehensions
topics.desc: [x for x in y if z] — write loops in one beautiful line

topics.name: Functions
topics.desc: def, parameters, return, default args, *args, **kwargs

topics.name: Scope & Namespaces
topics.desc: local vs global, why closures work the way they do

phases.name: Intermediate Python
phases.summary: The gap between beginner and real developer. Push through this phase.

topics.name: Classes & OOP
topics.desc: __init__, self, methods, inheritance, __str__, encapsulation

topics.name: File I/O
topics.desc: open(), read, write, context managers (with statement)

topics.name: Error Handling
topics.desc: try/except/finally, raise, custom exceptions, defensive coding

topics.name: Modules & import
topics.desc: import, from, standard library — os, sys, datetime, json

topics.name: Virtual Environments
topics.desc: venv, pip freeze, requirements.txt — isolate dependencies

topics.name: Decorators
topics.desc: @property, @staticmethod, writing your own decorators

topics.name: Generators
topics.desc: yield, memory-efficient iteration, generator expressions

topics.name: Regular Expressions
topics.desc: re module — search, match, findall for text processing

phases.name: Choose Your Path
phases.summary: Python goes everywhere. Pick the direction that excites you most.

topics.name: Flask (Web Apps)
topics.desc: routes, templates, forms, SQLAlchemy — build APIs and websites

topics.name: Django (Full-Stack Web)
topics.desc: ORM, admin panel, auth built-in — production-ready framework

topics.name: NumPy (Data Science)
topics.desc: Arrays, vectorized operations — foundation of all data work

topics.name: Pandas (Data Analysis)
topics.desc: DataFrames, read CSV, filter, group, plot — data in tables

topics.name: Matplotlib (Visualization)
topics.desc: Bar charts, line plots, scatter — show data visually

topics.name: Automation & Scripting
topics.desc: Rename files, send emails, scrape data — real-world scripts

topics.name: scikit-learn (ML)
topics.desc: Train models, evaluate accuracy — machine learning in 10 lines

resources.name: Python.org Tutorial
resources.desc: The official Python tutorial — thorough and free forever

resources.name: Automate the Boring Stuff
resources.desc: Free book by Al Sweigart. Practical Python with real projects.

resources.name: CS50P (Harvard)
resources.desc: Harvard's free Python course. Demanding but excellent.

resources.name: Real Python
resources.desc: In-depth tutorials. Many are free. High quality writing.

resources.name: Futurecoder.io
resources.desc: Interactive Python in the browser — beginner friendly, free

resources.name: Python Tutor
resources.desc: Visualize exactly what your code does step by step. Great for debugging.

resources.name: Kaggle (Free Courses)
resources.desc: Free Python, Pandas, SQL, ML courses from Kaggle. Good for data science.

tracks.title: Backend Development
tracks.subtitle: Build servers, APIs and databases that power the web

phases.name: Pick a Language
phases.summary: You need at least one language well. These three dominate backend jobs.

topics.name: JavaScript / Node.js
topics.desc: Same language as the browser. Huge ecosystem. Great for APIs.

topics.name: Python
topics.desc: Readable, versatile. Flask and Django are excellent frameworks.

topics.name: Java
topics.desc: Enterprise standard. Spring Boot is very powerful.

topics.name: Go (Golang)
topics.desc: Fast, simple, great for microservices. Growing fast in industry.

topics.name: Learn One Well First
topics.desc: Don't jump between languages. Get one to production quality first.

phases.name: Web Servers & APIs
phases.summary: Understanding HTTP deeply is non-negotiable for backend development.

topics.name: HTTP Protocol
topics.desc: Methods (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE), status codes, headers, body

topics.name: REST API Design
topics.desc: Resources, endpoints, versioning, response structure

topics.name: Express.js or Flask
topics.desc: Routing, middleware, request/response objects

topics.name: JSON & Data Formats
topics.desc: Serialize data, parse JSON, XML basics, content-type headers

topics.name: Middleware
topics.desc: Logging, error handling, CORS, body parsing — the request pipeline

topics.name: Environment Variables
topics.desc: .env files, process.env, never commit secrets to git

topics.name: Postman or Insomnia
topics.desc: Test your APIs without building a frontend first

phases.name: Databases
phases.summary: Data persistence is the core of every real application.

topics.name: SQL Fundamentals
topics.desc: SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE — every backend dev must know SQL

topics.name: Database Design
topics.desc: Tables, relationships, foreign keys, normalization, ERDs

topics.name: MySQL / PostgreSQL
topics.desc: Set up a database, connect it to your app, run real queries

topics.name: Indexes & Performance
topics.desc: Why queries slow down, how indexes help, EXPLAIN queries

topics.name: ORMs (Sequelize/SQLAlchemy)
topics.desc: Write database queries in your language without raw SQL

topics.name: MongoDB (NoSQL)
topics.desc: Documents instead of tables — good to know, not a replacement

topics.name: Redis (Caching)
topics.desc: In-memory cache — make your app 100× faster for repeated data

phases.name: Auth & Security
phases.summary: Get this wrong and you'll make the news for the wrong reasons.

topics.name: Password Hashing (bcrypt)
topics.desc: Never store plain text passwords. Use bcrypt, argon2 or scrypt.

topics.name: JWT (JSON Web Tokens)
topics.desc: Stateless auth — sign tokens, verify on every request

topics.name: Sessions & Cookies
topics.desc: Server-side state — how traditional auth works

topics.name: HTTPS & SSL/TLS
topics.desc: Encrypt traffic — mandatory for anything real

topics.name: Input Validation
topics.desc: Never trust user input. Validate server-side. Always.

topics.name: SQL Injection Prevention
topics.desc: Parameterized queries, ORMs — don't build SQL strings from input

topics.name: CORS
topics.desc: Cross-Origin Resource Sharing — why your API blocks the frontend

phases.name: Production & DevOps
phases.summary: Writing code is 40% of the job. Running it reliably is the other 60%.

topics.name: Linux Command Line
topics.desc: Navigate, create files, permissions, processes — servers run Linux

topics.name: Git & GitHub
topics.desc: Branches, pull requests, merge conflicts — team collaboration

topics.name: Docker Basics
topics.desc: Containers, Dockerfile, docker-compose — same environment everywhere

topics.name: CI/CD Pipelines
topics.desc: GitHub Actions — test and deploy automatically on every push

topics.name: Cloud Basics (AWS/GCP)
topics.desc: EC2, S3, RDS — where real apps live

topics.name: Monitoring & Logging
topics.desc: Know when your app crashes before your users do

resources.name: The Odin Project
resources.desc: Full-stack curriculum with Node.js backend track. Free.

resources.name: CS50W (Harvard)
resources.desc: Harvard's Web Programming with Python & JavaScript. Free.

resources.name: Full Stack Open
resources.desc: Best free Node.js + React + SQL course. University of Helsinki.

resources.name: MDN HTTP Guide
resources.desc: Deep understanding of HTTP — required reading for backend devs

resources.name: SQLZoo
resources.desc: Interactive SQL exercises, browser-based, completely free

resources.name: DigitalOcean Tutorials
resources.desc: Thousands of tutorials on servers, Linux, Docker, databases — free

tracks.title: Computer Science Fundamentals
tracks.subtitle: The theory that makes you a better programmer
tracks.duration: Ongoing — study alongside your main language

phases.name: Think Like a Computer
phases.summary: Before algorithms, understand how computers actually work.

topics.name: Binary & Hexadecimal
topics.desc: How computers store numbers. Why 0xFF = 255.

topics.name: How Memory Works
topics.desc: RAM, stack vs heap, memory addresses, pointers (concept)

topics.name: Compilation vs Interpretation
topics.desc: Why some languages are fast, others flexible

topics.name: Boolean Logic & Gates
topics.desc: AND, OR, NOT, XOR — the foundation of all computation

topics.name: Command Line
topics.desc: Navigate, compile, run programs — the real developer interface

phases.name: Data Structures
phases.summary: Choose the wrong data structure and your code is slow. Know them all.

topics.name: Arrays
topics.desc: Indexed, fixed-size — O(1) access, slow insert/delete

topics.name: Linked Lists
topics.desc: Nodes with pointers — fast insert/delete, slow search

topics.name: Stacks & Queues
topics.desc: LIFO / FIFO — implement with arrays or linked lists

topics.name: Hash Tables
topics.desc: Key-value, O(1) average — how Python dicts and JS objects work

topics.name: Binary Trees
topics.desc: BST, traversals (in/pre/post-order), height, balance

topics.name: Graphs
topics.desc: Adjacency lists/matrix, directed/undirected, weighted

topics.name: Heaps & Priority Queues
topics.desc: Min-heap, max-heap — implement in O(log n) time

phases.name: Algorithms
phases.summary: The reason Big Tech companies make you solve puzzles in interviews.

topics.name: Big O Notation
topics.desc: O(1), O(n), O(n²), O(log n) — measure how your code scales

topics.name: Sorting
topics.desc: Bubble, Selection, Merge, Quick — know Merge and Quick cold

topics.name: Binary Search
topics.desc: Find in sorted array in O(log n) — classic and essential

topics.name: Recursion
topics.desc: Functions that call themselves. Base cases. Stack frames.

topics.name: BFS & DFS
topics.desc: Breadth-first, depth-first — traversing trees and graphs

topics.name: Dynamic Programming
topics.desc: Memoization, tabulation — break hard problems into subproblems

topics.name: Two Pointers / Sliding Window
topics.desc: Common interview patterns — learn to recognize problem types

phases.name: Systems & Networks
phases.summary: How real software systems work under the hood.

topics.name: Operating Systems
topics.desc: Processes, threads, scheduling, virtual memory, file systems

topics.name: TCP/IP Networking
topics.desc: IP, TCP vs UDP, DNS, sockets — how data travels the internet

topics.name: Concurrency
topics.desc: Threads, mutexes, race conditions, async — parallel execution

topics.name: Database Internals
topics.desc: B-trees, ACID, transactions, indexing — why SQL works fast

topics.name: Security Basics
topics.desc: Encryption, hashing, TLS, common attacks (SQL injection, XSS)

phases.name: Interview Preparation
phases.summary: Study the theory, then practice applying it. 100 problems minimum.

topics.name: LeetCode (Easy, then Medium)
topics.desc: Do 75–150 problems. Focus on arrays, strings, trees, graphs

topics.name: System Design Basics
topics.desc: Load balancers, caching, databases, scaling — for senior interviews

topics.name: Write Clean Code
topics.desc: Meaningful names, small functions, no magic numbers

topics.name: Contribute to Open Source
topics.desc: Read others' code, send PRs — best real-world practice

topics.name: Build & Ship Projects
topics.desc: 3 solid projects > 50 toy scripts. Finish things.

resources.name: CS50 (Harvard)
resources.desc: Harvard's intro to CS. Absolutely free. The best starting point.

resources.name: MIT OpenCourseWare 6.006
resources.desc: MIT's algorithms course. Lecture videos + assignments, free.

resources.name: Neetcode.io
resources.desc: Free roadmap + video solutions for LeetCode patterns. Excellent.

resources.name: Visualgo
resources.desc: Visualize sorting, trees, graphs — animations for every algorithm

resources.name: Khan Academy CS
resources.desc: Free CS theory, algorithms, and cryptography from Khan Academy

resources.name: The Missing Semester (MIT)
resources.desc: Git, CLI, shell scripting, vim — the dev tools nobody teaches
